category_sources: source_facts.description says Source code beautifier; official GitHub README describes Uncrustify as a source code beautifier for multiple programming languages.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading uses Uncrustify; source_facts.name is uncrustify.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README documents features, build, running, and configuration; source_facts.homepage is the official SourceForge project page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/uncrustify/uncrustify, so repo was not re-evaluated per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official README identify Uncrustify as a configurable source-code beautifier for C, C++, Objective-C, Java, and related languages.
